title: ProDec 7 Piece Foam 4 inch Mini Paint Rollers, Soft Grip Frame and Tray Set for a Smooth Finish with Gloss and Satin Paints on Skirting Boards, Window Sills, Panel Doors, Cabinets, Metal and More, 4"
features: 5x trade quality high density foam mini rollers for lint-free application and a superb finish with water- and solvent/oil-based gloss and satin paints, as well as undercoat and primer
Applies paint quicker than a brush for fast, efficient coverage and no brush marks
4" size ideal for skirting boards, window sills, panel doors, metalwork and more
Ergonomic push fit mini roller frame with soft grip handle for comfort
Black mini tray made from 100% recycled plastic
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Is this the right roller for me? In a nutshell Foam mini rollers are widely used by professionals on wood and metal in preference to brushes as they enable faster, more efficient coverage with no brush marks. Trade quality foam is higher density and better quality than DIY grade foam and is a great choice for skirting boards, window sills, doors and panels. Useful to know Ideal for both water- and solvent/oil-based paints. Lint-free so it can be used straight from the bag without pre-washing. For more product information see the bottom section. What to use and where PAINTS: Gloss, Satin, Undercoat, Primer SURFACES: Wood, Metal FRAME: Fits all standard mini roller frames Applying Gloss & Satin paints by mini roller ProDec has a choice of trade quality mini roller fabrics to help you achieve a high quality finish with gloss and satin paints. Use this guide to help you make the right choice. Foam Trade grade high density foam with small cells designed to avoid any air pockets, eliminating bubbles in the paint that could otherwise spoil the finish. The foam absorbs paint, releasing it gradually through each roll and giving even surface coverage for less working out and improved efficiency. Mohair High quality, solvent-resistant woven synthetic fabric that is more durable than foam. The pile is cut to 5mm, ensuring the optimum film thickness is applied, giving excellent coverage without the risk of the paint film skinning. Short pile microfibre The softest fabric of all, giving a very light touch and less roller texture in the paint film. Microfibre absorbs the paint inside the fibres, instead of it just sitting between them, meaning that it both loads more smoothly and releases the paint more evenly throughout the stroke, requiring less working out and increasing your painting efficiency. Ensure you select the 6mm short pile, not the 12mm medium pile version. Flocked foam Very short flock fibres which are electrostatically coated onto a high density foam body, giving a very short pile roller that leaves no texture in the paint film. Flock gives the ultimate mirror-smooth finish - ideal for high gloss paints. More information on this product Mini rollers are widely used by trade professionals in preference to brushes when painting flat areas with gloss and satin paints as they enable faster, more efficient coverage. They also have the added advantage of leaving no brush marks, which can sometimes be a problem with some water-based trim paints which are much faster drying than the traditional solvent/oil-based versions. Foam is a good choice for applying water- and solvent/oil-based gloss and satin paints as well as undercoat and primer, giving a superb finish with no roller texture, and the high density grade these rollers are made from is more durable than low density DIY grades. Foam is also lint-free, enabling you to use it straight from the packaging without pre-washing and not having to worry about any fabric shedding as you paint that would slow you down. ProDec foam rollers are made using open-cell foam which absorbs paint into the foam, releasing it gradually through each roll and giving even surface coverage for less working out and improved efficiency. The cells in high density foam are smaller than low density grades and are designed to avoid any air pockets, eliminating bubbles in the paint that could otherwise spoil the finish. The 5 rollers in this pack are 4” (100mm) width, which is ideal for skirting boards, window sills, panel doors, metalwork and more. The set is completed with a 26cm long push fit mini roller frame with an ergonomic soft grip handle for comfort, giving reduced hand fatigue during use and a mini tray made from 100% recycled plastic.
